rulings.Case Title: STEVEN F GREENWALD et al VS. STEVEN A MINISINI et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 26, 2015 line 4. PLAINTIFFS STEVEN GREENWALD and ROCHELLE ALPERT's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DENIED. As to the first cause of action for quiet title, Plaintiffs failed to shift the burden and show that they are entitled to the judgment for quiet title as a matter of law. Plaintiffs fail to show any adverse ownership or possessory claims by Defendants. This issue has been previously ruled upon by this Court re: Judgment on the Pleadings. The "indemnity clause" relied upon by the Plaintiffs for the proposition that Defendants make an adverse claim, does not give rise to such claim. As to the second cause of action for declaratory relief, Plaintiffs fail to shift the burden and show that they are entitled to judgment for declaratory relief as a matter of law. Plaintiffs fail to identify a present actual controversy, fail to join a party whose presence is required to grant complete relief, and seek declaratory relief as to the rights already addressed in other causes of action (e.g. 5th cause of action for removal of encroaching structures and request for relief "defendants are obligated to remove all fixtures, appurtenances and construction they caused to be added to or changed on any part of 56 Presidio¿" (Motion 13:18-24)). = (501/REQ)
